summary_en: 3,000,000 shares (4.6% of shares outstanding) up to ¥3.0B. Open-market purchase on Tokyo Stock Exchange. Period: May 15 – July 8, 2026. Rationale: capital-efficiency improvement and flexible response to business environment changes.
title_en: Notice of determination of matters concerning treasury stock acquisition (acquisition of treasury stock based on articles of incorporation under Companies Act Article 165, Paragraph 2)
translation_en_brief: COVER Corporation's board of directors resolved on May 14, 2026 to authorize a treasury stock acquisition program. The company will acquire up to 3,000,000 ordinary shares (4.6% of outstanding shares excluding treasury stock) for a maximum total of ¥3.0 billion via open-market purchase on the Tokyo Stock Exchange. The acquisition period runs from May 15 to July 8, 2026. The stated rationale is to improve capital efficiency and implement flexible capital policy in response to changing business conditions. As of March 31, 2026, the company held 84 treasury shares against 65,650,100 outstanding shares.
